channel.title: Planet Golang
channel.description: Planet Golang - aggregated Go community content

item.title: Understanding Go's Memory Model
item.dc:creator: Alex Writer
item.description: A deep dive into how Go manages memory and goroutine synchronisation.

item.title: Building REST APIs with Go 1.26
item.dc:creator: Jordan Dev
item.description: Practical patterns for building efficient REST APIs using the latest Go release.

item.title: Go generics in practice: lessons from a year of production use
item.dc:creator: Sam Engineer
item.description: What we learned after migrating a large codebase to use generics in Go 1.21 and beyond.
